Meta.title: Untopo: Leak detection reports.
Meta.description: Create leak detection reports faster. Untopo simplifies creating and sending professional leak detection reports.

Home.subtitle: Create, customize, and send your leak detection reports directly from your computer or phone.

PdfShowcase.title: Professional PDF reports
PdfShowcase.description: Untopo turns your interventions into clear, structured PDF reports ready to send — directly to your clients or their insurer — in one click.

VoiceShowcase.title: Simpler writing
VoiceShowcase.description: Dictate your report aloud or type it manually. Untopo can then automatically correct and polish your text without changing the meaning of your observations.

CreatorShowcase.title: Built for specialists
CreatorShowcase.description: Untopo was developed with field professionals to create a simple, fast, and effective experience for writing your reports — on phone and computer alike.

report.title: Report creator
report.description: Create leak detection reports quickly with a fluid interface

pdf.title: Professional PDF generation
pdf.description: Automatically generate clean, structured PDF reports ready to send to your clients or insurers.

history.title: Intervention history
history.description: Easily find your past reports and the full history of your interventions.

contacts.title: Contacts and places directory
contacts.description: Addresses and contacts linked to your reports are automatically saved in your Untopo directory.

palette.title: Report customization
palette.description: Add your logo and automatically brand your PDF reports with your company colors.

mail.title: Send reports by email
mail.description: Send your reports directly from Untopo with a professional layout that includes your logo.

FeaturesPage.metaDescription: Voice dictation, annotated photos, professional PDF, and contacts directory — discover Untopo for leak detection specialists.
FeaturesPage.title: A field assistant, not management software
FeaturesPage.description: Untopo focuses on one mission: saving you time on every intervention report, with as little friction as possible.

1.title: Start the intervention
1.text: Create a report in one tap. The app keeps the draft active so you can continue later.

2.title: Describe and photograph
2.text: Dictate your findings, capture damaged areas, and annotate visuals on site.

3.title: Validate and send
3.text: Generate the PDF, review it, and share it with the client or insurer.

FeaturesPage.notDescription: No heavy CRM, no endless admin flows, no multi-day training. Untopo stays a fast, reliable field tool.

mic.title: Structured voice dictation
mic.description: Describe the intervention out loud. Untopo transcribes and organizes the content into a clear report — no endless forms.

camera.title: Photos & annotations
camera.description: Capture damaged areas, annotate on site, and link each visual to the right place in the report.

file.title: Professional PDF
file.description: Generate an export ready to send to the client or insurer, with your logo and contact details.

contacts.title: Contacts & places directory
contacts.description: Find clients, addresses, and intervention history without re-entering the same information.

mobile.title: Built for the field
mobile.description: Mobile-first interface, usable one-handed — even with gloves or in the rain. Install the app on your home screen.

sync.title: Offline then sync
sync.description: Work without network in basements or under parking. Your drafts stay on the device until sync.

Faq.metaDescription: Frequently asked questions about Untopo: access, Pro plan, offline use, and data security.
Faq.title: Frequently asked questions
Faq.description: Everything you need to know before using Untopo on your next interventions.

items.question: Who is Untopo for?
items.answer: Untopo is designed for leak detection professionals, whether they work alone or in a team. The app simplifies creating, managing, and sending reports directly from the field.

items.question: Does Untopo work on phone and computer?
items.answer: Yes. Untopo works on smartphone, tablet, and computer, so it can support you both on site and at the office.

items.question: Does the app work without network or 4G?
items.answer: Yes. You can continue your intervention offline: complete a report, add information, and take photos. As soon as the connection is restored, sync happens automatically.

items.question: Can I start a report on site and finish it at the office?
items.answer: Yes. Start on site, continue at the office on another device: your drafts sync automatically as soon as the connection is restored.

items.question: Do I need to install software?
items.answer: No. Untopo runs directly in your browser, with no installation. Just sign in to your account.

items.question: Can I customize my reports with my logo?
items.answer: Yes. Add your logo to automatically brand your PDF reports and emails with your company colors.

items.question: Can I send my reports directly from Untopo?
items.answer: Yes. Send your reports directly from Untopo with a professional email ready to send.

items.question: Are reports suitable for insurers and property managers?
items.answer: Yes. Reports generated by Untopo include the information generally expected for an intervention: requester identification, leak origin, affected areas, measurement device readings, and photos in a professional layout.

items.question: Can I edit a report after creating it?
items.answer: Yes. You can edit, complete, and reopen a report at any time — including after finalization, and from another device once synced.

items.question: Are my past reports kept?
items.answer: Yes. You can access your intervention history at any time.

items.question: Is my data secure?
items.answer: Yes. Your reports and photos are stored securely and are only accessible to you.
